name: Sarah Keller
headline: Tech founder, post-exit. Wants to retire early, leave a legacy, and give with impact.

dna.name: Legacy
dna.note: Multi-generational wealth transfer is the north star.

dna.name: Impact
dna.note: Wants giving to be measurable, not symbolic.

dna.name: Family
dna.note: Two teenagers; preparing them to inherit responsibly.

dna.name: Security
dna.note: Capital preservation over upside.

dna.name: Health
dna.note: Has the means but not the time; runs on empty.

dna.name: Freedom
dna.note: Wealth is concentrated and illiquid; not yet freedom.

dna.name: Growth
dna.note: Still curious; angel-invests in impact ventures.

dna.name: Lifestyle
dna.note: Comfortable but deliberately understated.

dna.name: Wealth
dna.note: CHF 180M net worth post-exit.

dna.name: Business
dna.note: Exited operating role; now a board member and investor.

goals.title: Retire from operating roles at 55
goals.notes: Step back from boards; keep selective investing.

goals.title: Fund both children's university education
Acquire a family residence in the Engadin
Pre-fund the Keller Foundation grant cycle
Sabbatical travel with the family

name: Marco Bernasconi
headline: Family-business owner weighing a partial sale; cautious, hands-on.

goals.title: Sell a minority stake to fund diversification
Hand the business to the next generation

name: Eleanor Ashford
headline: Third-generation family matriarch; cross-border UK/CH structure.

goals.title: Equalise inheritance across four grandchildren
Resolve UK/CH residency tax asymmetry

name: Rafael Santos
headline: Recently liquid sports professional; first-time private-banking client.

goals.title: Protect career earnings for life after sport
Launch a youth foundation

name: Mei-Lin Chen
headline: Next-generation heir taking over family philanthropy.

goals.title: Shift the portfolio to 100% sustainable mandates
Scale the family foundation's annual giving

name: Lukas Adler
headline: Second-generation pharma-distribution heir; just inherited the group, onboarding fresh.

dna.name: Legacy
dna.note: Just inherited; wants to honour his father's company and protect it for his son.

dna.name: Impact
dna.note: Open to healthcare-access giving but undecided and cautious.

dna.name: Family
dna.note: Recently divorced; co-parenting a young son he wants to provide for.

dna.name: Security
dna.note: Inheritance feels fragile; wants to de-risk before doing anything bold.

dna.name: Health
dna.note: Healthy but stretched by grief and a sudden operational load.

dna.name: Freedom
dna.note: Wealth is locked in the operating company and property; very little is liquid.

dna.name: Growth
dna.note: Curious about diversifying out of a single-sector concentration.

dna.name: Lifestyle
dna.note: Comfortable Munich lifestyle, no appetite for excess.

dna.name: Wealth
dna.note: CHF 240M, but concentrated in the family GmbH and real estate.

dna.name: Business
dna.note: Now sole shareholder and acting chairman of Adler Pharma Distribution GmbH.

goals.title: Diversify out of single-company concentration
goals.notes: Roughly 60% of net worth sits in the family GmbH; phased de-risking.

goals.title: Set up a trust for his son
goals.notes: Provide for the seven-year-old independent of the divorce settlement.

goals.title: Acquire a primary residence in Munich
Explore a healthcare-access foundation
goals.notes: Tentative; honour his father's name in the pharma sector.

name: Viktor Sokolenko
headline: Cross-border energy and metals industrialist; opaque offshore structure, onboarding under enhanced due diligence.

dna.name: Legacy
dna.note: Wants the industrial group to outlast him and pass cleanly to three children.

dna.name: Impact
dna.note: Some regional giving in Cyprus, but undefined and reputation-driven.

dna.name: Family
dna.note: Three children across two jurisdictions; eldest now studying in London.

dna.name: Security
dna.note: Geopolitical exposure makes asset protection the first priority.

dna.name: Health
dna.note: High-stress operating life; constant travel.

dna.name: Freedom
dna.note: Wealth is locked in an offshore holding chain; very little is cleanly liquid.

dna.name: Growth
dna.note: Wants to diversify out of energy and metals into mainstream markets.

dna.name: Lifestyle
dna.note: Residences in Zug and Limassol; understated by choice for political reasons.

dna.name: Wealth
dna.note: CHF 410M, but concentrated and held through opaque vehicles.

dna.name: Business
dna.note: Controls Meridian Energy Holdings, an energy and metals trading group.

goals.title: Diversify out of the energy and metals group
goals.notes: Roughly 70% of net worth sits in the Cyprus holding company; phased de-risking.

goals.title: Fund the eldest child's studies in London
goals.notes: Eldest is UK-resident; cross-border gift treatment unclear.

goals.title: Acquire a London residence
goals.notes: UK situs asset; creates direct UK tax exposure.

goals.title: Restructure the family holding into a transparent trust
goals.notes: Replace the BVI nominee arrangement with a vehicle the bank can see through.

name: Dr. Elena Marchetti
headline: Robotics founder, post-exit. Building a Luxembourg holding, a Jersey family trust, and a STEM foundation across Ticino and Lombardy.

dna.name: Legacy
dna.note: Just stood up a Jersey family trust and a foundation; multi-generational structure is the priority.

dna.name: Impact
dna.note: CHF 8M STEM foundation funding scholarships across Ticino and Lombardy; wants measurable reach.

dna.name: Family
dna.note: Married to Marco, who is a co-beneficiary of the trust and a director; no children on file.

dna.name: Security
dna.note: Wants the holding and trust to ring-fence and protect the exit proceeds.

dna.name: Health
dna.note: Decompressing after a multi-year build and sale.

dna.name: Freedom
dna.note: Now liquid after the November 2023 sale; first time with real optionality.

dna.name: Growth
dna.note: Already redeploying; acquired Alpine Ventures GmbH in 2025.

dna.name: Lifestyle
dna.note: Zurich base plus a Ticino villa; understated.

dna.name: Wealth
dna.note: About CHF 200M after the CHF 180M company sale.

dna.name: Business
dna.note: Exited Helvetia Robotics; now controls a holding and an acquired VC firm.

goals.title: Consolidate the exit proceeds under Marchetti Holding SA
goals.notes: Finish moving liquid and private assets under the Luxembourg holding.

goals.title: Endow the Marchetti Education Foundation
goals.notes: STEM scholarships across Ticino and Lombardy; she is Founder and Principal.

goals.title: Build a venture portfolio around Alpine Ventures GmbH
goals.notes: Use the 2025-acquired VC firm to redeploy into early-stage robotics.

goals.title: Complete the Jersey family trust funding
goals.notes: Settle remaining holding shares into the trust; Marco is co-beneficiary and a director.
